name: arifOS-APEX-G
description: Constitutional governance server — 11 canonical MCP tools with F1-F13 floor enforcement, metabolic routing, prompts, and resources.

tools.name: init_anchor
tools.description: 🔥 THE IGNITION STATE OF INTELLIGENCE (Unified). ONE tool for ALL constitutional session operations. Modes: 'init' (establish identity), 'state' (forensic audit), 'status' (bootstrap diagnostics), 'revoke' (kill session), 'refresh' (rotate token).

oneOf.description: Legacy string format (auto-normalized to structured object)
Structured intent object with query, task_type, domain, desired_output, reversibility

intent.description: User intent - accepts string (legacy) or structured object (preferred for governance)

human_approval.description: Whether human has pre-approved this action (F13 Sovereign override)

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: arifOS_kernel
tools.description: 444_ROUTER: Primary metabolic conductor. Processes complex queries through the 000-999 pipe. Modes: 'kernel' (reasoning), 'status' (vitals).

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: apex_soul
tools.description: 888_JUDGE: Final authority for verdicts and defense. Modes: 'judge', 'rules', 'validate', 'hold', 'armor', 'notify', 'probe' (test floors).

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: vault_ledger
tools.description: 999_VAULT: Permanent decision recording and integrity. Modes: 'seal', 'verify'.

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: agi_mind
tools.description: 333_MIND: Core reasoning and synthesis engine. Modes: 'reason', 'reflect', 'forge'.

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: asi_heart
tools.description: 666_HEART: Safety, empathy, and consequence modeling. Modes: 'critique', 'simulate'.

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: engineering_memory
tools.description: 555_MEMORY: Governed autonomous engineering and vector memory. Modes: 'engineer' (execute), 'vector_query' (search), 'vector_store' (save), 'vector_forget' (delete), 'generate' (create). Constitutional: F10/F2 verification on all vector queries.

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: physics_reality
tools.description: 111_SENSE: Earth-Witness fact acquisition and mapping. Modes: 'search', 'ingest', 'compass', 'atlas', 'time' (temporal intelligence — current UTC+KL datetime, weekday, quarter).

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: math_estimator
tools.description: Quantitative health and metabolic estimation. Modes: 'cost', 'health', 'vitals', 'entropy'.

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

tools.name: architect_registry
tools.description: Tool and resource discovery + Model Registry. Modes: 'register', 'list', 'read', 'model_catalog', 'model_profile', 'provider_soul', 'verify_identity'.

soul_key.description: Provider soul key for provider_soul mode

claimed_identity.description: Model identity claim for verify_identity mode

claimed_provider.description: Optional provider hint for verify_identity mode

auth_context.description: Optional auth context for continuity (F11) and sovereignty (F13).

allow_execution.description: If true, execution is permitted IF floors pass.

resources.description: Detailed specification of the 13 Constitutional Floors (F1-F13).

resources.description: Functional and safety contracts for the 11 Mega-Tools.

resources.name: State Ladder
resources.description: Forensic session state progression: anonymous -> claimed -> anchored -> verified -> scoped -> approved.

resources.description: Immutable thresholds and legal doctrine for the 13 Floors.

resources.description: Real-time thermodynamic and metabolic health of the kernel.

resources.description: Canonical registry of AI agent competencies and behaviors.

resources.name: Caller State
resources.description: Current session identity, authority level, and available next actions.
